title: Pavlova
instructions: Beat egg whites until soft peaks.
Bake at low heat for 1 hour.
Top with whipped cream and fruits.

reviews.text: Perfect pavlova! Added a splash of vanilla and a pinch of salt. Also added a dash of lemon zest and topped with passion fruit.
Used berries and kiwi for topping. Added extra vanilla and a pinch of cream of tartar. Served with mango coulis.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
